pricing.title: Choose Your Plan
pricing.subtitle: Unlock premium features to supercharge your real estate journey.
pricing.yearlySavings: Save up to 50% with yearly billing!
pricing.upgradeToProUnlock: Upgrade to Pro to unlock this feature
pricing.upgradeToEliteUnlock: Upgrade to Elite to unlock this feature
pricing.upgradeNote: To upgrade your plan, please contact our support team.
pricing.paymentComingSoonDesc: To upgrade your plan, please contact our team directly and we'll assist you.
pricing.faq_switch_q: Can I switch plans at any time?
pricing.faq_switch_a: Yes — upgrades take effect immediately. Downgrades apply at the end of your current billing period.
pricing.faq_data_q: What happens to my data if I downgrade?
pricing.faq_data_a: All your data is preserved. Gated features become inaccessible but nothing is deleted.
pricing.faq_trial_q: Is there a free trial for Pro or Elite?
pricing.faq_trial_a: We offer a 7-day trial for Pro. Contact support@aqarai.iq for an Elite trial.
pricing.faq_currency_a: Yes, all prices are in US Dollars. IQD payments can be arranged through our support team.

settings.title: Settings
settings.languageNote: Changing the language applies instantly across all sections of the app.

valuation.scopedDesc: This valuation is scoped exclusively to this listing. Confirm below to proceed.
valuation.noPropertyText: Valuation is available on a per-property basis. Select a specific property from the marketplace, then request a valuation from its listing page.
